title: Create:Relics integration
description: Create: Relics Integration adds Create-styled sequenced assembly crafts for all items from the Relics mod.
body:
**Create: Relics Integration** bridges the gap between mechanical engineering and ancient magic. This add-on completely rebalances the acquisition of powerful items from the **Relics** mod by replacing random dungeon loot with intricate, multi-stage Sequenced Assembly lines. Automate the arcane using precision mechanics: step by step, deploy components, press circuits, and infuse raw frames with active energy right on your assembly belts. Turn random luck into pure engineering!

**_Below are the crafts_**:

*   on the left is the item being crafted
*   next are the items for crafting
*   the item in the frame with the earth background is just an item
*   the item in the frame with the blue background is the liquid that needs to be poured
*   the press in the glowing frame means it needs to be pressed
* the number of candles at the end means that it needs to be repeated that many times
![basic recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4a90b1e83e78fb13b7073ac9469f0ab65e06ccc.png)
![second basic recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc099d1578336cdfb970532f481eb44cd85b0b9a.png)
![relic xp bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eecacbc23052c6aed8d1ad9817314cfc0213a14.png)
